slices.name: TestManifestDoctorCLI
slices.code:
9 | class TestManifestDoctorCLI(unittest.TestCase):
  10 |     _DOCTOR = str(pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "manifest_doctor.py")
  11 |     _COLUMNS = "root,rel_path,abs_path,ext,size,mtime_iso,sha1"
  12 | 
  13 |     def _run(self, args):
  14 |         return subprocess.run(
  15 |             [sys.executable, self._DOCTOR] + args,
  16 |             cwd=str(pathlib.Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1]),
  17 |             capture_output=True,
  18 |             text=True,
  19 |         )
  20 | 
  21 |     def _write_manifest(self, path: pathlib.Path, rows: list[str]) -> None:
  22 |         lines = [self._COLUMNS] + rows
  23 |         path.write_text("\n".join(lines) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
  24 | 
  25 |     def _make_real_row(self, tmp: pathlib.Path, name: str = "source.py") -> tuple[pathlib.Path, str]:
  26 |         """Create a real file and return (file_path, CSV row)."""
  27 |         f = tmp / name
  28 |         f.write_text("# source\n", encoding="utf-8")
  29 |         ext = f.suffix
  30 |         size = f.stat().st_size
  31 |         row = f".,{name},{f},{ext},{size},2026-04-29T10:00:00,"
  32 |         return f, row
  33 | 
  34 |     # ----- PASS -----
  35 | 
  36 |     def test_clean_manifest_passes(self):
  37 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
  38 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
  39 |             _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp)
  40 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
  41 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [row])
  42 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
  43 | 
  44 |             result = self._run(["--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out)])
  45 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  46 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  47 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "PASS")
  48 |             self.assertIn("Manifest Doctor status: PASS", result.stdout)
  49 | 
  50 |     # ----- WARN -----
  51 | 
  52 |     def test_venv_pollution_warns(self):
  53 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
  54 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
  55 |             venv_dir = tmp / ".venv" / "lib"
  56 |             venv_dir.mkdir(parents=True)
  57 |             f = venv_dir / "util.py"
  58 |             f.write_text("# venv\n", encoding="utf-8")
  59 |             row = f".,{f.relative_to(tmp)},{f},.py,10,2026-04-29T10:00:00,"
  60 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
  61 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [str(row)])
  62 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
  63 | 
  64 |             result = self._run(["--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out)])
  65 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  66 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  67 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "WARN")
  68 |             self.assertGreater(data["summary"]["suspicious_paths"], 0)
  69 | 
  70 |     def test_bundle_artifact_warns(self):
  71 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
  72 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
  73 |             # Real file whose rel_path contains _bundle_
  74 |             f = tmp / "project_bundle_20260429.py"
  75 |             f.write_text("# bundle\n", encoding="utf-8")
  76 |             row = f".,project_bundle_20260429.py,{f},.py,10,2026-04-29T10:00:00,"
  77 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
  78 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [str(row)])
  79 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
  80 | 
  81 |             result = self._run(["--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out)])
  82 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
  83 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
  84 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "WARN")
  85 |             self.assertGreater(data["summary"]["bundle_artifacts"], 0)
  86 | 
  87 |     def test_oversize_file_warns(self):
  88 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
  89 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
  90 |             _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp)
  91 |             # Override size in the row to exceed the threshold
  92 |             parts = row.split(",")
  93 |             parts[4] = "2000000"  # 2 MB in size column
  94 |             row = ",".join(parts)
  95 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
  96 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [row])
  97 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
  98 | 
  99 |             result = self._run([
 100 |                 "--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out),
 101 |                 "--max-file-size", "1000000",
 102 |             ])
 103 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 104 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 105 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "WARN")
 106 |             self.assertGreater(data["summary"]["oversize_files"], 0)
 107 | 
 108 |     def test_soft_row_threshold_warns(self):
 109 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 110 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 111 |             rows = []
 112 |             for i in range(5):
 113 |                 _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp, f"file{i}.py")
 114 |                 rows.append(row)
 115 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
 116 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, rows)
 117 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 118 | 
 119 |             result = self._run([
 120 |                 "--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out),
 121 |                 "--max-rows-soft", "3",
 122 |             ])
 123 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 124 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 125 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "WARN")
 126 |             self.assertTrue(data["summary"]["rows_exceeded_soft"])
 127 | 
 128 |     # ----- BLOCK -----
 129 | 
 130 |     def test_missing_required_path_blocks(self):
 131 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 132 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 133 |             _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp)
 134 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
 135 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [row])
 136 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 137 | 
 138 |             result = self._run([
 139 |                 "--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out),
 140 |                 "--required-path", "README.md",
 141 |             ])
 142 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 2, result.stderr)
 143 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 144 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "BLOCK")
 145 |             self.assertIn("README.md", data["findings"]["missing_required_paths"])
 146 | 
 147 |     def test_missing_required_ext_blocks(self):
 148 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 149 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 150 |             _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp, "source.py")
 151 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
 152 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [row])
 153 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 154 | 
 155 |             result = self._run([
 156 |                 "--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out),
 157 |                 "--required-ext", ".md",
 158 |             ])
 159 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 2, result.stderr)
 160 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 161 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "BLOCK")
 162 |             self.assertIn(".md", data["findings"]["missing_required_exts"])
 163 | 
 164 |     def test_hard_row_threshold_blocks(self):
 165 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 166 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 167 |             rows = []
 168 |             for i in range(5):
 169 |                 _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp, f"file{i}.py")
 170 |                 rows.append(row)
 171 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
 172 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, rows)
 173 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 174 | 
 175 |             result = self._run([
 176 |                 "--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out),
 177 |                 "--max-rows-hard", "3",
 178 |             ])
 179 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 2, result.stderr)
 180 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 181 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "BLOCK")
 182 |             self.assertTrue(data["summary"]["rows_exceeded_hard"])
 183 | 
 184 |     def test_missing_required_columns_blocks(self):
 185 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 186 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 187 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
 188 |             # Malformed: missing required columns
 189 |             manifest.write_text("path,size\n./foo.py,100\n", encoding="utf-8")
 190 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 191 | 
 192 |             result = self._run(["--manifest", str(manifest), "--out", str(out)])
 193 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 2, result.stderr)
 194 |             data = json.loads(out.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
 195 |             self.assertEqual(data["status"], "BLOCK")
 196 |             self.assertIn("error", data)
 197 | 
 198 |     # ----- Markdown output -----
 199 | 
 200 |     def test_markdown_out_writes_file(self):
 201 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
 202 |             tmp = pathlib.Path(td)
 203 |             _, row = self._make_real_row(tmp)
 204 |             manifest = tmp / "manifest.csv"
 205 |             self._write_manifest(manifest, [row])
 206 |             out = tmp / "report.json"
 207 |             md_out = tmp / "report.md"
 208 | 
 209 |             result = self._run([
 210 |                 "--manifest", str(manifest),
 211 |                 "--out", str(out),
 212 |                 "--markdown-out", str(md_out),
 213 |             ])
 214 |             self.assertEqual(result.returncode, 0, result.stderr)
 215 |             self.assertTrue(md_out.exists(), "Markdown report file was not created")
 216 |             content = md_out.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
 217 |             self.assertIn("# Manifest Doctor Report", content)
 218 |             self.assertIn("PASS", content)

200 |     def test_markdown_out_writes_file(self):
 201 |         with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory() as td:
